description: A discrete point in the flow of time, an instance when something occurs. It represents both the fleeting nature of individual moments and their potential for containing infinite significance.
rationale: The word 'phelu' begins with the breath-like fricative 'phe', suggesting the ephemeral quality of moments. The final 'lu' with its liquid consonant represents the flowing continuity in which moments arise. Together they capture both the discrete and continuous nature of temporal experience.
